name: jat13-app
description: JAT 13 desktop app — the brain. Electron main (scheduler, apply engine, better-sqlite3, Hono server on 7860) + preload + vanilla/WebGL2 renderer.
comment:ai: AI screening fallback = Codex CLI via child_process (user's subscription login). NO Anthropic/OpenAI/Ollama SDK dependency (see DECISIONS-LOCKED.md).
comment:renderer: Aurora renderer is vanilla ES modules + raw WebGL2, bundled by esbuild (root devDep). NO svelte/vite/three.
